shortDescription: Bright and airy 4-bedroom detached home in the heart of East York, move-in ready with generous lot.
fullDescription: Welcome to 55 Donlands Avenue in the vibrant East York neighbourhood. This beautifully presented detached home offers generous living space across multiple levels. The main living area boasts an open-concept design with pot lights and a cosy gas fireplace. The kitchen features modern finishes including a gas range, integrated dishwasher, and pantry storage. Upstairs, 4 bright bedrooms include a primary retreat with ensuite and double closets. Building amenities include a fitness centre, rooftop terrace, party room, and 24-hour concierge. Enjoy a 90+ walk score with parks, cafes, schools, and transit all within minutes.
keyFeatures: Pot lights and designer fixtures throughout
Renovated galley kitchen with breakfast bar
